title: Projekt- und Prozessmanager Lead Management (m/w/d)
company: SCHUNK - Hand in hand for tomorrow
matched_skills: Marketing/PR degree (Master PR & Advertising, Bachelor Management)
Marketing automation concept knowledge (IPC GTM campaigns, GRG product marketing)
Reporting, dashboards, KPIs (Power BI, Looker Studio — PL-300 certified)
Cross-functional stakeholder coordination (Marketing+Sales alignment at IPC, GRG)
missing_skills: German C1 required (CV: B1 only) — HARD BLOCKER for German Mittelstand
Industrial B2B manufacturing process experience (SCHUNK = clamping/gripping tech; CV has no manufacturing domain)
Marketing automation in industrial context specifically
recommended_emphasis: Highlight IPC: GTM strategy, lead generation, B2B sales collateral — closest to lead management work
Emphasise data analytics / KPI dashboard capability (Power BI PL-300) as reporting backbone
Frame HSBC programme process optimisation as cross-functional process management
Note: German B1 is a hard gap — this Mittelstand role will almost certainly require working German
Tool gap (SAP Sales Cloud, Evalanche) should be acknowledged; emphasise fast tech adoption track record
core_responsibilities: Aufbau, Implementierung und Optimierung der Lead-Management- und Marketing-Automation-Prozesslandschaft
Steuerung und Optimierung der end-to-end Prozesse im Lead Management
Lead-Status und Qualifizierung mit Marketing und Vertrieb definieren
Tool Owner für SAP Sales Cloud und EVALANCHE Integration
Datenbasierte Maßnahmen zur Verbesserung der Customer Experience
summary: Moderate match (50.8), but with significant practical barriers. The candidate has marketing degree, analytics capability (Power BI), and process management experience. However: (1) German C1 is required — this is a German Mittelstand manufacturer where working German is essential; (2) all three key tools (SAP Sales Cloud, Evalanche, snapADDY) are absent from CV; (3) industrial B2B manufacturing context is new to the candidate (CV background is banking, IoT, e-commerce). The role is operationally specific to marketing automation tooling that the candidate doesn't currently have. Worth generating CV only if candidate plans to address the tool gaps and German language requirement.
